headline: PayPal: Keeping It As A Possible Convexity Play For Two Reasons (Rating Upgrade)
summary: I view PayPal as a convexity play as I believe its remaining with downside is inferior to its upside potential. Read more here.

headline: 3 Stocks Under $50 That Concern Us
summary: Stocks in the $10-50 range offer a sweet spot between affordability and stability as they’re typically more established than penny stocks. But their headline prices don’t guarantee quality, and investors should exercise caution as some have shaky business models.

raw.headline: 3 Stocks Under $50 That Concern Us

headline: FTC warns PayPal, Visa, Mastercard and Stripe against debanking after Trump’s executive order
summary: The Federal Trade Commission has warned PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, and Stripe against debanking practices. President Trump and his sons have frequently bemoaned debanking practices. The Trump family claims it got into crypto because of unfair treatment from banks.

headline: PayPal Bybit EU MiCA Link Highlights Valuation Gap And Earnings Concerns
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) is integrating with Bybit EU to offer direct fiat funding and withdrawals for crypto users in Europe under the MiCA framework. The partnership introduces PayPal as a payments option on a major MiCA regulated crypto platform, with access for both deposits and cashing out. A co branded rewards campaign is launching alongside the integration to promote usage and highlight compliant digital asset access for European users. For PayPal, this move comes at a time...
